title: Bridge Essay: Spiritual awakening and transformation in scientists and academics.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Spiritual awakening and transformation in scientists and academics.** — Explore (NY). PMID: 36100544. DOI: 10.1016/j.explore.2022.08.016. The purpose of this study was to document both quantitatively and qualitatively the characteristics of spiritual awakenings and their transformational effects in scientists and academics who reported having experienced this phenomenon; it also aimed to explore barriers these individuals perceived to sharing their experiences with others within society. METHODS: An interview questionnaire was used to collect detailed descriptions of both the physical and metaphysical experiences of 54 scientists
